summary: Frontend-only regression on FA Summary tab (run 0e4cc62f-52f9-4668-b598-f60bd0c52803 / cli_7f0b86b1ab0b). All acceptance items pass: tab wiring, Compute tab cleanup, Summary render, KPI strip, validation/OCR cards, audit-flag grid, MIS counts, block breakdown, top 10 additions, top 5 suppliers, adjustment strip, quarterly chart, and Excel + PDF downloads.

design_issues.screen: FA Landing — Ledgers workbench filter (pre-existing, NOT in scope of this change)
issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' on fa-filter select — caused by visual-editor instrumentation wrapping option labels in <span>. Cosmetic console warning only; no functional impact. Worth noting for a later cleanup.

verified.tab_wiring: fa-tab-compute label='Compute', fa-tab-summary present (LayoutGrid icon) immediately after Compute.
verified.compute_tab_cleanup: fa-compute-btn present; fa-export-btn ABSENT; fa-export-pdf-btn ABSENT; copy mentions 'Summary' tab 2x.
verified.kpi_tiles: 5 tiles rendered (Opening WDV ₹3.01 Cr, Capitalised Adds ₹2.63 Cr, Sales ₹50 k, Depreciation ₹72.92 L, Closing WDV ₹4.90 Cr) with both compact and exact ₹ values.
verified.validation_card: Shows 'No validation run yet' italic copy — matches expected (no validation persisted).
verified.ocr_card: 29.5% · 28 of 95 additions linked · Attached ₹36,75,991.17 / Unattached ₹2,37,24,554.39 · '4 uploads pending — 27 chunks unapplied'. Rose progress bar (<50%).
verified.audit_flags: Header shows '1 open'. Only 'Un-reviewed additions' has count 50 (amber); all 5 others count 0 (slate). Matches spec.
verified.mis_counts: 6 stat cards — 21 Active Ledgers · 95 Capitalised Additions (₹2,74,00,545.56) · 6 Merged · 3 Discount lines · 1 Sale (₹50k) · 40 Half-rate pool (₹1,63,29,402.25).
verified.block_breakdown: 5 rows sorted desc by rate (40% Computers, 40% P&M, 15% P&M, 15% Vehicles, 10% Furniture).
verified.top_additions: 10 rows, rank + desc + supplier + block + PTU + '½ rate' flag where applicable + compact ₹.
verified.top_suppliers: 5 suppliers with bar proportional to value (Alpine Knits ₹2.03 Cr dominant).
verified.adjustments: 5 rows (Other Expenses 4/₹1.85L, ITC Reversed 2/₹57.5k, Interest Capitalised 1/₹18.3k, Forex 0, Discounts/Credits 0 with '−' badge).
verified.quarterly: 5 bars rendered (screenshot confirms chart present at bottom).
verified.downloads: Excel = IT_Depreciation_Allman_Knitwear_FY2024-25.xlsx, 18,765 bytes (>5KB). PDF = IT_Depreciation_Allman_Knitwear_FY2024-25.pdf, 25,549 bytes (>5KB). Both trigger browser download via blob.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Pre-existing hydration warning on fa-filter <select> options (visual-editor wrapping with <span>) — unrelated to this change but flagged for future cleanup.
SummaryTab.jsx imports `useMemo` used only in QuarterlyChart (fine); no other code smells spotted. Component stays at 578 lines — still readable but approaching split threshold.
Single GET /summary call on tab mount is snappy and avoids waterfall calls — good pattern.
seed_data_creation: None — used the existing demo run as instructed; state left untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FA Summary tab fully wired and passing end-to-end on the demo run. Excel/PDF downloads now live only on Summary tab. Compute tab has only Compute button (no export CTAs). One pre-existing hydration warning in Ledgers workbench <select> options is unrelated.
